caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The shirt he is wearing features white text that reads "ION NEVEDO" and "SUIT" above "ORK". In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands near a rack of colorful garments. A logo featuring a red circle with the word "SIDE" and red text that reads "REALLY FLY TOT" appears in the corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts from looking down and away to looking toward the camera with a smile and speaking. He slightly adjusts his posture, leaning back slightly while continuing to interact with someone off-camera.
